cards.back: A linear approach to software development where each phase is completed before moving to the next one
A development methodology where each phase is planned, executed, and controlled to meet specific goals and deliverables
A development approach where each phase builds on the previous one, with continuous feedback and improvement
A hybrid model that combines elements of the Waterfall and Iterative models, with a focus on iterative development and continuous monitoring
A development model that involves testing and validation at each phase, with a focus on ensuring that the software meets the required specifications
